code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
end

fn second_token(_ s: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if is_ws(c)
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  mut done2 = false
  while i < n and not done2
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if is_ws(c)
        done2 = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done2 = true
    end
  end
  mut done3 = false
  while i < n and not done3
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if is_ws(c)
        i = i + 1
      else
        done3 = true
      end
    when None
      done3 = true
    end
  end
  let start = i
  mut done4 = false
  while i < n and not done4
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if is_ws(c)
        done4 = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done4 = true
    end
  end
  if start >= i
    None
  else
    Some(string.substring(s, start, i))
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut eof = false
while not eof
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    match second_token(line)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        total = total + n
      when None
        total = total
      end
    when None
      total = total
    end
  when None
    eof = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
